variables.COACH_ONE_LINER: a fitness coach who helps busy dads over 35 lose 20+ pounds without giving up their weekends
variables.LEAD_SOURCE_CONTEXT: filled out the form on Instagram asking about the 90-Day Dad Bod Transformation program
variables.LEAD_ACTION: requested info about the 90-day program earlier today
QUALIFICATION_CRITERIA: They personally want to solve this (not shopping for someone else)
Their goal is fat loss, energy, or getting back in shape — something the program actually addresses
They confirm they're in a position to invest in a program if it's a fit (ask softly: "If Marcus maps out a plan and it's a fit, are you in a spot where you could invest in yourself right now?")
They can attend a Zoom call within the next 7 days
PROGRAM_FACTS: 90-Day Dad Bod Transformation: 1-on-1 coaching, weekly video check-ins, custom training and nutrition plan, private community
Designed for men 30-50 with less than 5 hours per week to train
Clients typically train 3 times per week, 45 minutes per session, home or gym
No foods are banned; the nutrition system is built around family meals
Coach Marcus: 12 years coaching, former D1 athlete, has coached 300+ dads since 2014
NOT a fit for: people wanting a done-for-you meal delivery service, competitive bodybuilders, anyone under 18
variables.SOCIAL_PROOF: Marcus has coached over 300 dads since 2014
variables.FREE_RESOURCE: Marcus's free 20-minute Dad Bod Reset training
variables.DISCLOSURE_RULE: In your very first sentence of the call, disclose that you are an AI assistant (several US states require this). Do it casually, exactly like the opener in THE CONVERSATION ARC.

sampleLead.formAnswers: Goal: lose 25 lbs. Biggest struggle: no time, travels for work.
